sys_script.description:
2.6 STRY0097131 - HHS. Parent task does not come out of WAIT STATE when last completed subtask is "information only" or "acknowledgement" Tasker type
2.5.5: Condition updated: If the task is other than ACK and ITT task type, and any subtasks are still open (no close complete, no close incomplete, or no cancel), all other subtasks will be close as well STRY0053207: ACK STRY0053216: ITT
sys_script.name: Tasker - On Cancel or Close
